overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic city. The journey transitions from under elevated highways through open urban vistas and into narrow neon-lit canyons, featuring cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards and dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass transitioning to open road

events.description: vehicle emerges from under the elevated highway into bright open sky

agents.ego_description: driving forward under concrete overpasses, accelerating toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with geometric support beams creating a covered corridor
thick structural columns supporting the overhead highway infrastructure
horizontal slat barriers lining the right side of the roadway
futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels beneath a massive elevated highway structure, with concrete pillars and beams creating a semi-covered corridor. Around 8 seconds, the scene brightens dramatically as the vehicle emerges from the underpass, revealing a futuristic city skyline with glass skyscrapers in the distance. Sparse traffic moves ahead on the multi-lane asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with city views

events.description: vehicle passes under a secondary overpass, briefly shadowing the road
approaching the Brookland district sign as the highway descends toward street level

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway, passing other vehicles while approaching the Brookland district

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left lane, moving at higher speed

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement screen displaying animated content on the left side of the highway
overhead gantry sign with 'Brookland' text marking the district entrance
futuristic monorail or train tracks running parallel to the highway on elevated supports

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an open elevated highway with full sky visibility and direct sunlight. The camera passes under secondary overpasses and alongside modern glass skyscrapers that grow larger as the vehicle approaches the Brookland district. Large digital billboards and elevated train infrastructure become visible as the highway begins its descent toward street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional urban street entering Brookland district

events.description: passing under the Brookland overhead sign, entering the district proper
vehicle takes a sharp right turn, navigating around a corner near large billboards

agents.ego_description: navigating through the Brookland entrance, making a sharp turn while avoiding other traffic and street obstacles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking on the sidewalk near the large billboard

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertisement displaying 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2' with product imagery
lower-rise commercial structures with storefronts at ground level
illuminated signs and holographic displays attached to building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the Brookland district sign and enters a more enclosed urban environment with street-level buildings and large digital billboards. The lighting becomes mixed as the vehicle moves into partial shadow. Around 30 seconds, the vehicle executes a sharp right turn near a prominent 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2' billboard, navigating through moderate traffic while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon with towering buildings

events.description: entering a deep urban canyon with tall buildings creating a narrow corridor
dramatic light shafts penetrate from above, creating high contrast between shadow and sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow urban canyon, following traffic while surrounded by towering skyscrapers on both sides

entered.detail: tall building facades creating a narrow corridor effect on the left side
network of suspended cables and wires stretching between buildings above the street
elevated roadway or transit line running overhead between the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dramatic urban canyon where towering skyscrapers block most of the sky, creating a narrow enclosed corridor. Dramatic light shafts penetrate from above, illuminating dust particles and creating high-contrast lighting. Overhead cables and suspended infrastructure crisscross between the canyon walls. The vehicle continues driving through this dense cyberpunk environment, passing neon signs and ground-level storefronts while navigating moderate traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from the oppressive shadows of an underpass into a bright urban expanse before descending into a dense, neon-lit city canyon. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway of concrete pillars and beams, moving forward until the scene brightens dramatically as the vehicle emerges into the open air to reveal a distant skyline of glass skyscrapers. As the vehicle travels along the sunlit highway, the environment shifts toward the Brookland district, passing under secondary overpasses and alongside growing skyscrapers and digital billboards before the road descends to street level. The scene then tightens as the vehicle passes a district sign and executes a sharp right turn past a prominent billboard, moving from open sunlight into the mixed shadows of street-level buildings and pedestrian traffic. Finally, the camera enters a dramatic urban canyon where towering skyscrapers block the sky, creating a narrow corridor filled with high-contrast light shafts, overhead cables, and glowing neon storefronts.
